ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Continued To Feb-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laura Zolnekoff, via ZOOM, for Mercedes Diaz and Astrid Garcia, Personal Representatives.

The court asks counsel if the current bond in the amount of $2000,000 is sufficient based on the Inventory and Appraisal filed that lists real property valued at over $1.5 million dollars. Counsel reports that little assets remain in the estate as net proceeds of the sale of the real property went to a third party and that the court can expect an updated Final Inventory and Appraisal within the next few weeks. Counsel also reports that a Petition for Final Distribution should be filed by the end of January next year.

After additional discussion, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Feb-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
